name: ai-business-search
tagline: ClawHub (69★): 指导本地商家通过7天优化流程提升在AI大模型搜索中的曝光和推荐效果。
verdict: Badly broken: there's no frontmatter description at all, so a dispatching agent can't even discover this skill exists. Steps like strategy and competitor analysis name a goal without any real method, and mismatched-business-name failures are never addressed.

highlights.summary: There is no frontmatter description field at all, so a dispatching agent has no trigger-clarity signal to read; only a body '## 描述' section exists, which is not the same mechanism.
Several workflow steps (e.g. step 3 '策略制定' and step 4 '竞对分析') name a goal but give no concrete method, criteria, or commands for how to actually perform the analysis/strategy step.
No step anywhere addresses what to do if a failure-prone condition occurs — e.g. business name not matching the license, or the effectiveness-verification step (lines 47-51) findin
